usage: vibe kits claude-code install [-h] [--home HOME] [--dry-run] [--yes]
                                     [--no-settings]

options:
  -h, --help     show this help message and exit
  --home HOME    Target config base directory (default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME or
                 current user's home)
  --dry-run      Show changes without writing files
  --yes, -y      Apply without interactive confirmation
  --no-settings  Do not merge the safe settings fragment
